entity.summary: U.S.-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched on October 8, 2015. Gemini expanded its European regulatory structure in 2025 when Gemini Intergalactic EU, Ltd. received a MiCA licence from the Malta Financial Services Authority.
entity.notes: The launch date remains the first official trading day. The Malta MiCA licence applies to Gemini Intergalactic EU, Ltd. and European crypto-asset services; it should not be read as a licence for every Gemini affiliate or global product.

expected.summary: United States-based centralized exchange launched in 2015 and still operating under the Gemini brand.
expected.notes: Gemini company materials describe the business as founded in 2014, while the exchange officially opened trading on 2015-10-08.

changes.summary: U.S.-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched on October 8, 2015. Gemini expanded its European regulatory structure in 2025 when Gemini Intergalactic EU, Ltd. received a MiCA licence from the Malta Financial Services Authority.
changes.notes: The launch date remains the first official trading day. The Malta MiCA licence applies to Gemini Intergalactic EU, Ltd. and European crypto-asset services; it should not be read as a licence for every Gemini affiliate or global product.

events.title: Gemini announced receipt of a Malta MiCA licence
events.description: Gemini announced that Gemini Intergalactic EU, Ltd. had received a MiCA licence from the Malta Financial Services Authority, enabling regulated crypto-asset services across the EU and EEA through the Malta entity.
events.notes: The licence is scoped to the Malta entity and its European crypto-asset services.

evidence.title: Gemini Receives Its MiCA Licence, Supporting Ongoing EU Expansion
evidence.notes: First-party announcement identifying the Malta MiCA licence and European expansion scope.

evidence.title: Is Gemini licensed and/or regulated?
evidence.notes: Current first-party regulatory overview for Gemini entities and licences.
